pkgmetadata.longdescription: mihomo-tui is a simple TUI (Terminal User Interface) dashboard for monitoring and managing Mihomo via its REST API. Built with Rust and ratatui, it provides real-time proxy status, traffic monitoring, and configuration management directly from the terminal.
mihomo-tui 是一个简洁的终端用户界面 (TUI) 仪表板，用于通过 REST API 监控和管理 Mihomo。使用 Rust 和 ratatui 构建，提供实时代理状态、 流量监控和配置管理功能，可直接在终端中使用。
